summary: This bundle records deterministic proof that repo-scope doctor output can point at runner assessment setup before the first bounded eval loop when the repo adapter is otherwise ready.

evidenceScope.claimBoundary: Only the CLI reference claim that ready repo setup can still point at runner assessment setup before the first bounded run is marked satisfied.
notClaimed: Every adapter always needs a runner assessment before eval
The runner assessment itself has already been created for the tested temp repo
A live model or product runner was executed

notableAssertions: doctor returns a ready repo payload for an adapter with an execution surface
doctor --next-action text mode mentions runner assessment
first_bounded_run is present and starts from the scenario catalog before the eval test loop

decision.reason: The focused CLI smoke test runs the doctor command through the public CLI path and verifies the runner-readiness next action plus first bounded run guide in the same payload.
